title: ASHRAE thermal envelope limits documentation
difficulty_justification: Direct lookup of ASHRAE A2 thermal limits from the cooling runbook — single-source retrieval, no computation.
query_text: What are the ASHRAE A2 thermal envelope limits we must maintain for our equipment? What is the maximum allowable inlet temperature?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: ASHRAE A2 thermal envelope: inlet temperature 10°C – 35°C (dry bulb), with 27°C maximum recommended. Relative humidity: 8%–80% non-condensing. Temperature change rate: ≤5°C/hour. Equipment operating above 35°C inlet risks thermal throttling or shutdown.

checkpoints.description: Agent states 35°C as the maximum inlet temperature.
